ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the pollutant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "threshold_high" REAL /* Upper threshold for the pollutant concentration */,
  "threshold_low" REAL /* Lower threshold for the pollutant concentration */,
  "health_impact" TEXT /* Potential health impacts of the pollutant */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Potential environmental impacts of the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Name of the contact person for the location
Email of the contact person for the location
Units of measurement for the pollutant
